title: MysticRift: More Recepts DISCONTINUED
description: Make items you couldn't make before.
body:
![Recepts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3c8e092acd17b549e43ecbd2c5b4c488db1b9b8.png)

Thanks to this mod you can now make items that you couldn't make before. think of: Command blocks, Encanted apple, Barrier, etc! all recipes are in the photos! Do you want to craft a mob spawner or Minecraft spawn eggs ? Download our mod | Link: [Spawn & Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/mysticrift-mobspawner-spawn-eggs) |

![Bug report.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/693efbece9f4074fb5cc2722d5cf114825033732.png)

Please report bugs or crashes in the tab ( Issues ) - Github.

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60bb0a7695e1731ca46537123f78fee10b78467c.png)

![end portal.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f272a39c57b5c0c315670a98d17cdf2b99d6707.png)

![structure block.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c346679211f546f07b62e6a959d7a9d83833bda.png)
